description: Component for polling an AWS SQS queue for new messages.

queue_url.label: Queue Url
queue_url.description: Full URL of the SQS queue to poll

job_name.label: Job Name
job_name.description: Name of the job to trigger when messages are received

visibility_timeout_seconds.label: Visibility Timeout Seconds
visibility_timeout_seconds.description: Seconds a message stays hidden from other consumers while being processed

region_name.label: Region Name
region_name.description: AWS region name. Uses default boto3 region if not set.

resource_key.label: Resource Key
resource_key.description: Optional Dagster resource key providing a pre-configured client.

name: Sqs Monitor
